test.name: Sort products Z to A

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get all products
Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.msg: ${product_names} = ['Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)', 'Sauce Labs Onesie', 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Backpack']

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Product not in Z to A order ${current} < ${next}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Verify high to low sorting
Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.msg: Product not in high to low order 49.99 < 29.99
kw.arg: Product not in high to low order ${current} < ${next}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
kw.status: Product not in high to low order 49.99 < 29.99

iter.status: Product not in high to low order 49.99 < 29.99

for.status: Product not in high to low order 49.99 < 29.99

kw.status: Product not in high to low order 49.99 < 29.99

test.status: Product not in high to low order 49.99 < 29.99
